title: Nanotate - Tag distribution
author: Olga Giraldo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 232 parts-of-speech from open access experimental protocols in biology were tagged by using the Nanotate tool with the six available categories (sample, equipment, reagent, input, output, step).
steps_raw: 232 parts-of-speech from open access experimental protocols in biology were tagged by using the Nanotate tool with the six available categories (sample, equipment, reagent, input, output, step).
